summary: Backend-only testing for Punjab Honda API. Created comprehensive pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_punjab_honda.py covering root, bikes catalog & filters, branches, enquiry creation for all 7 types, admin auth, admin enquiries listing/filters, admin stats, and PATCH status updates. All 33 tests passed (100%) against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

minor.issue: Returns 200 (not 201) - acceptable for verify-style endpoint but slightly non-RESTful for POST
Returns 200 instead of 201 Created for resource creation (works fine, just convention)

critical_code_review_comments: ADMIN_TOKEN has hardcoded fallback default 'punjab-honda-admin-2026' in server.py - acceptable for MVP but should be required (no default) in production.

today_start in /api/admin/stats compares ISO string lexicographically against created_at strings; works because all timestamps use the same UTC ISO format, but this couples query correctness to string format.
Bikes list is in-memory; no admin endpoint to manage inventory - acceptable per spec but worth noting.
EmailStr imported but not used (Optional[str] used instead) - minor cleanup.
test_credentials: Admin token: punjab-honda-admin-2026 via X-Admin-Token header
seed_data_creation: Tests created multiple TEST_-prefixed enquiries in MongoDB (one per enquiry type + a few patch tests). Data not cleaned up; safe since test DB and tests are idempotent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified. _id leakage confirmed prevented in admin GET responses (id is uuid string). All 7 enquiry types (product_enquiry, test_ride, quote, service_booking, insurance, contact, amc) accepted. Bike counts: motorcycle=9, scooter=4, ev=2, bigwing=6 (total 21). Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_punjab_honda.py for regression.
